description: RouterOS アクセス先統計。passive DNS (sniffer) と netflow (traffic-flow, TCP/UDP のみ) を answer_ip⋈dst_ip で時間窓 join (client優先→IP fallback, 24h last-seen) し、クライアント別のアクセス先ドメインと帯域を可視化。ipipv6 トンネル transport・ICMP 等の非 L4 は除外。silver 直読み (DuckDB/MyDuck datasource)。設計: dotfiles-private#326。

panels.title: アクセス先統計 (passive-DNS ⋈ netflow, dotfiles-private#326)

panels.description: 実 L4 (TCP/UDP) 外部トラフィック bytes のうちドメイン名が付いた割合 (client優先→IP fallback, 24h last-seen join)。非 L4 (ipipv6 トンネル transport・ICMP) は除外済。残りは passive DNS に一度も現れない宛先 = DoH/DoT 迂回・直 IP (ゲーム/P2P/WebRTC)。この未帰属分は GeoIP/ASN enrich (v2) で組織/国別に特性化予定。

targets.rawSql:
WITH pd AS (
  SELECT ts AS dns_ts, client_ip, qname, answer_ip FROM read_parquet('s3://logs-archive/silver/source=passive-dns/date=*/logs.parquet', hive_partitioning=true) WHERE $__timeFilter(date)
),
nf AS (
  SELECT ts AS flow_ts, src_ip, dst_ip, bytes FROM read_parquet('s3://logs-archive/silver/source=netflow/date=*/logs.parquet', hive_partitioning=true)
  WHERE $__timeFilter(date) AND proto IN ('Tcp', 'Udp')
),
flows AS (
  SELECT flow_ts, src_ip AS client, dst_ip AS remote, bytes FROM nf
  UNION ALL
  SELECT flow_ts, dst_ip AS client, src_ip AS remote, bytes FROM nf
),
flows_ext AS (
  SELECT * FROM flows
  WHERE NOT (remote LIKE '192.168.%' OR remote LIKE '10.%' OR remote LIKE '240b:%' OR remote = '114.17.55.115')
),
att AS (
  SELECT f.flow_ts, f.client AS client_ip, f.bytes,
    CASE WHEN s.dns_ts >= f.flow_ts - INTERVAL 24 HOUR THEN s.qname
         WHEN a.dns_ts >= f.flow_ts - INTERVAL 24 HOUR THEN a.qname END AS qname
  FROM flows_ext f
  ASOF LEFT JOIN pd s ON f.client = s.client_ip AND f.remote = s.answer_ip AND s.dns_ts <= f.flow_ts
  ASOF LEFT JOIN pd a ON f.remote = a.answer_ip AND a.dns_ts <= f.flow_ts
)
SELECT max(flow_ts) AS time, 100.0*sum(CASE WHEN qname IS NOT NULL THEN bytes ELSE 0 END)/NULLIF(sum(bytes),0) AS value FROM att

panels.title: DNS 帰属率 (named bytes %)

panels.description: LAN クライアント ↔ 外部の実 L4 (TCP/UDP) 総バイト (上り+下り)。内部 (LAN 内/router) flow と非 L4 (トンネル/ICMP) は除外。

targets.rawSql:
WITH pd AS (
  SELECT ts AS dns_ts, client_ip, qname, answer_ip FROM read_parquet('s3://logs-archive/silver/source=passive-dns/date=*/logs.parquet', hive_partitioning=true) WHERE $__timeFilter(date)
),
nf AS (
  SELECT ts AS flow_ts, src_ip, dst_ip, bytes FROM read_parquet('s3://logs-archive/silver/source=netflow/date=*/logs.parquet', hive_partitioning=true)
  WHERE $__timeFilter(date) AND proto IN ('Tcp', 'Udp')
),
flows AS (
  SELECT flow_ts, src_ip AS client, dst_ip AS remote, bytes FROM nf
  UNION ALL
  SELECT flow_ts, dst_ip AS client, src_ip AS remote, bytes FROM nf
),
flows_ext AS (
  SELECT * FROM flows
  WHERE NOT (remote LIKE '192.168.%' OR remote LIKE '10.%' OR remote LIKE '240b:%' OR remote = '114.17.55.115')
),
att AS (
  SELECT f.flow_ts, f.client AS client_ip, f.bytes,
    CASE WHEN s.dns_ts >= f.flow_ts - INTERVAL 24 HOUR THEN s.qname
         WHEN a.dns_ts >= f.flow_ts - INTERVAL 24 HOUR THEN a.qname END AS qname
  FROM flows_ext f
  ASOF LEFT JOIN pd s ON f.client = s.client_ip AND f.remote = s.answer_ip AND s.dns_ts <= f.flow_ts
  ASOF LEFT JOIN pd a ON f.remote = a.answer_ip AND a.dns_ts <= f.flow_ts
)
SELECT max(flow_ts) AS time, sum(bytes)::BIGINT AS value FROM att

panels.title: 外部トラフィック総量 (range)

panels.description: passive DNS で観測した distinct qname 数 (RouterOS リゾルバ経由)。

targets.rawSql: SELECT max(ts) AS time, count(DISTINCT qname)::BIGINT AS value FROM read_parquet('s3://logs-archive/silver/source=passive-dns/date=*/logs.parquet', hive_partitioning=true) WHERE $__timeFilter(date)

panels.title: 観測ドメイン数 (distinct qname)

panels.description: DNS を引いた distinct LAN クライアント数。

targets.rawSql: SELECT max(ts) AS time, count(DISTINCT client_ip)::BIGINT AS value FROM read_parquet('s3://logs-archive/silver/source=passive-dns/date=*/logs.parquet', hive_partitioning=true) WHERE $__timeFilter(date)

panels.title: アクティブクライアント数

panels.description: 実 L4 外部トラフィックを named/unnamed で日次 stack。unnamed (passive DNS 非経由) の比率が DoH/DoT・直 IP (ゲーム/P2P) の規模を示す。

targets.rawSql:
WITH pd AS (
  SELECT ts AS dns_ts, client_ip, qname, answer_ip FROM read_parquet('s3://logs-archive/silver/source=passive-dns/date=*/logs.parquet', hive_partitioning=true) WHERE $__timeFilter(date)
),
nf AS (
  SELECT ts AS flow_ts, src_ip, dst_ip, bytes FROM read_parquet('s3://logs-archive/silver/source=netflow/date=*/logs.parquet', hive_partitioning=true)
  WHERE $__timeFilter(date) AND proto IN ('Tcp', 'Udp')
),
flows AS (
  SELECT flow_ts, src_ip AS client, dst_ip AS remote, bytes FROM nf
  UNION ALL
  SELECT flow_ts, dst_ip AS client, src_ip AS remote, bytes FROM nf
),
flows_ext AS (
  SELECT * FROM flows
  WHERE NOT (remote LIKE '192.168.%' OR remote LIKE '10.%' OR remote LIKE '240b:%' OR remote = '114.17.55.115')
),
att AS (
  SELECT f.flow_ts, f.client AS client_ip, f.bytes,
    CASE WHEN s.dns_ts >= f.flow_ts - INTERVAL 24 HOUR THEN s.qname
         WHEN a.dns_ts >= f.flow_ts - INTERVAL 24 HOUR THEN a.qname END AS qname
  FROM flows_ext f
  ASOF LEFT JOIN pd s ON f.client = s.client_ip AND f.remote = s.answer_ip AND s.dns_ts <= f.flow_ts
  ASOF LEFT JOIN pd a ON f.remote = a.answer_ip AND a.dns_ts <= f.flow_ts
)
SELECT date_trunc('day', flow_ts) AS time, CASE WHEN qname IS NOT NULL THEN 'named (DNS解決済)' ELSE 'unnamed (迂回/直IP)' END AS metric, sum(bytes)::BIGINT AS value FROM att GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1,2

panels.title: 日次トラフィック: named vs unnamed (stacked bytes)

panels.description: ドメイン別の総バイト (上り+下り、両方向 join)。

targets.rawSql:
WITH pd AS (
  SELECT ts AS dns_ts, client_ip, qname, answer_ip FROM read_parquet('s3://logs-archive/silver/source=passive-dns/date=*/logs.parquet', hive_partitioning=true) WHERE $__timeFilter(date)
),
nf AS (
  SELECT ts AS flow_ts, src_ip, dst_ip, bytes FROM read_parquet('s3://logs-archive/silver/source=netflow/date=*/logs.parquet', hive_partitioning=true)
  WHERE $__timeFilter(date) AND proto IN ('Tcp', 'Udp')
),
flows AS (
  SELECT flow_ts, src_ip AS client, dst_ip AS remote, bytes FROM nf
  UNION ALL
  SELECT flow_ts, dst_ip AS client, src_ip AS remote, bytes FROM nf
),
flows_ext AS (
  SELECT * FROM flows
  WHERE NOT (remote LIKE '192.168.%' OR remote LIKE '10.%' OR remote LIKE '240b:%' OR remote = '114.17.55.115')
),
att AS (
  SELECT f.flow_ts, f.client AS client_ip, f.bytes,
    CASE WHEN s.dns_ts >= f.flow_ts - INTERVAL 24 HOUR THEN s.qname
         WHEN a.dns_ts >= f.flow_ts - INTERVAL 24 HOUR THEN a.qname END AS qname
  FROM flows_ext f
  ASOF LEFT JOIN pd s ON f.client = s.client_ip AND f.remote = s.answer_ip AND s.dns_ts <= f.flow_ts
  ASOF LEFT JOIN pd a ON f.remote = a.answer_ip AND a.dns_ts <= f.flow_ts
)
SELECT qname, sum(bytes)::BIGINT AS bytes, count(*)::BIGINT AS flows FROM att WHERE qname IS NOT NULL GROUP BY qname ORDER BY bytes DESC LIMIT 50

panels.title: 宛先ドメイン ランキング (bytes)

panels.description: どの LAN クライアントがどのドメインへ何バイト通信したか。client優先 join のため大半は実 client の解決だが、共有 CDN IP は他 client の解決で名付く場合あり。

targets.rawSql:
WITH pd AS (
  SELECT ts AS dns_ts, client_ip, qname, answer_ip FROM read_parquet('s3://logs-archive/silver/source=passive-dns/date=*/logs.parquet', hive_partitioning=true) WHERE $__timeFilter(date)
),
nf AS (
  SELECT ts AS flow_ts, src_ip, dst_ip, bytes FROM read_parquet('s3://logs-archive/silver/source=netflow/date=*/logs.parquet', hive_partitioning=true)
  WHERE $__timeFilter(date) AND proto IN ('Tcp', 'Udp')
),
flows AS (
  SELECT flow_ts, src_ip AS client, dst_ip AS remote, bytes FROM nf
  UNION ALL
  SELECT flow_ts, dst_ip AS client, src_ip AS remote, bytes FROM nf
),
flows_ext AS (
  SELECT * FROM flows
  WHERE NOT (remote LIKE '192.168.%' OR remote LIKE '10.%' OR remote LIKE '240b:%' OR remote = '114.17.55.115')
),
att AS (
  SELECT f.flow_ts, f.client AS client_ip, f.bytes,
    CASE WHEN s.dns_ts >= f.flow_ts - INTERVAL 24 HOUR THEN s.qname
         WHEN a.dns_ts >= f.flow_ts - INTERVAL 24 HOUR THEN a.qname END AS qname
  FROM flows_ext f
  ASOF LEFT JOIN pd s ON f.client = s.client_ip AND f.remote = s.answer_ip AND s.dns_ts <= f.flow_ts
  ASOF LEFT JOIN pd a ON f.remote = a.answer_ip AND a.dns_ts <= f.flow_ts
)
SELECT client_ip, qname, sum(bytes)::BIGINT AS bytes FROM att WHERE qname IS NOT NULL GROUP BY client_ip, qname ORDER BY bytes DESC LIMIT 100

panels.title: クライアント × ドメイン (bytes)

panels.description: 総バイト上位 10 ドメインの日次帯域。

targets.rawSql:
WITH pd AS (
  SELECT ts AS dns_ts, client_ip, qname, answer_ip FROM read_parquet('s3://logs-archive/silver/source=passive-dns/date=*/logs.parquet', hive_partitioning=true) WHERE $__timeFilter(date)
),
nf AS (
  SELECT ts AS flow_ts, src_ip, dst_ip, bytes FROM read_parquet('s3://logs-archive/silver/source=netflow/date=*/logs.parquet', hive_partitioning=true)
  WHERE $__timeFilter(date) AND proto IN ('Tcp', 'Udp')
),
flows AS (
  SELECT flow_ts, src_ip AS client, dst_ip AS remote, bytes FROM nf
  UNION ALL
  SELECT flow_ts, dst_ip AS client, src_ip AS remote, bytes FROM nf
),
flows_ext AS (
  SELECT * FROM flows
  WHERE NOT (remote LIKE '192.168.%' OR remote LIKE '10.%' OR remote LIKE '240b:%' OR remote = '114.17.55.115')
),
att AS (
  SELECT f.flow_ts, f.client AS client_ip, f.bytes,
    CASE WHEN s.dns_ts >= f.flow_ts - INTERVAL 24 HOUR THEN s.qname
         WHEN a.dns_ts >= f.flow_ts - INTERVAL 24 HOUR THEN a.qname END AS qname
  FROM flows_ext f
  ASOF LEFT JOIN pd s ON f.client = s.client_ip AND f.remote = s.answer_ip AND s.dns_ts <= f.flow_ts
  ASOF LEFT JOIN pd a ON f.remote = a.answer_ip AND a.dns_ts <= f.flow_ts
)
, top AS (SELECT qname FROM att WHERE qname IS NOT NULL GROUP BY qname ORDER BY sum(bytes) DESC LIMIT 10)
SELECT date_trunc('day', flow_ts) AS time, qname AS metric, sum(bytes)::BIGINT AS value FROM att WHERE qname IN (SELECT qname FROM top) GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1,2

panels.title: Top-10 ドメイン 帯域推移 (日次)

title: Logs Archive - RouterOS Access Stats
